turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i am frank . nice to meet you . what is your name ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: my name is gary . great to meet you too .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i work as a general manager at a grocery store . what about you ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: do you have any hobbies ? i like to ready and go cycling

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i like snowboarding and horseback riding .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: do you have any dreams ? i hope to compete professionally or qualify for an event one day

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: that's interesting . i would love to start my own insurance company .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: that's so cool . how do you like to spend your free time ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i like watching movies with my wife .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i like to travel up to canada to enjoy the view and relax on weekends .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: canada is great for winter sports too .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: have you even been to canada for snowboarding ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: no , there is a place outside milwaukee i go .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: you should try going to canada one day . it is really beautiful there .
